CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Steven J. Lewicky, Esq. for Plaintiff: Intagio Trading Network, Inc., a Delaware Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Eric Jeck, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the defaulted Defendants: Blackstocks Investments, Inc., a Virginia Corporation; Blackstocks Investments, Inc., a Delaware Corporation; Urban Media Development Corporation, a Delaware Corporation; Moneymail.com, Inc., a Delaware Corporation; Blackstocks Development Corp., a Delaware Corporation; Loretta Perkins; Alton Perkins; and New Media, Inc., a Delaware Corporation (formerly DOE 1) as follows:
Damages $229,377.55
Attorney's Fees $18,643.00
Costs $1,109.30 for a total of $249,129.85
Judgment signed in open court.
